name: akd-agents
description: AKD Agents for Science — Claude Code plugins for exploring NASA science data, from Earth observation to planetary archives.

plugins.name: worldview-assistant
plugins.description: Explore NASA Worldview in natural language: discover satellite datasets, understand what they represent, and generate reproducible map visualizations.

plugins.name: pds-assistant
plugins.description: Find the right NASA Planetary Data System (PDS) datasets for a planetary-science query: route to the correct PDS node, walk the live archives, and return grounded dataset identifiers and paths.
